_comment: 2AIO front-door router. Maps a plain user prompt to the right high-level 2AIO pipeline entry point, and the 2aio-advisor hook injects a directive to use it — so 2AIO fires automatically without the user typing a /2aio-* command. Lanes are checked in order (first keyword hit wins = priority). Deliberately does NOT include a generic 'build/implement' lane — that is owned by codex-advisor (delegation), to avoid conflicting directives. Tune entirely here (JP+EN).

lanes.directive: This asks to comprehensively STRENGTHEN an existing system (security, quality, performance, a11y, observability, tests, UI). 2AIO has a dedicated autonomous lane that audits across dimensions, fixes CRITICAL/HIGH via Codex delegation, and loops until clean — without breaking behavior. Use the /2aio-harden command instead of ad-hoc fixes.

This is a business/viability question. 2AIO handles it with the board pipeline (取締役会: CEO/CFO/CMO/CTO/CSO → PRD). Use the /2aio-start-project command (or launch the 2aio-ceo-led board agents) to produce a structured decision + PRD instead of answering ad hoc.

This is a UI-redesign of an EXISTING system. 2AIO has a dedicated lane that reads the current code, audits it, and improves it in place WITHOUT rewriting from scratch or breaking behavior. Use the /2aio-redesign command instead of hand-editing styles ad hoc.

This is a research task. 2AIO routes research through the 2aio-researcher orchestrator + its 2aio-r-* specialists (web/news/sns/community/reference/gemini) for sourced, multi-modal results. Delegate to 2aio-researcher instead of a single ad-hoc web search.
